# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for Cloud Storage bucket that stores application backups. Use default settings without versioning or lifecycle management to keep configuration simple. This is for our backup storage that we'll enhance later based on retention requirements.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

resources:
- name: backup-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: ${project}-backup-bucket
    storageClass: STANDARD
    location: US
    defaultEventBasedHold: false
    encryption:
      defaultKmsKeyName: ${project}-backup-key
    labels:
      environment: production
      backup: true
    billing:
      requesterPays: false
    cors:
    - origin: []
      method: []
      responseHeader: []
      maxAgeSeconds: 0
    iamPolicy:
      bindings:
      - role: roles/storage.objectCreator
        members:
        - serviceAccount:${project}-backup-sa@${project}.iam.gserviceaccount.com
      - role: roles/storage.objectViewer
        members:
        - serviceAccount:${project}-backup-sa@${project}.iam.gserviceaccount.com
    retentionPolicy:
      isLocked: false
      retentionPeriod: 0
    versioning:
      enabled: false
    lifecycle:
      rule: []
    logging:
      logBucket: ""
      logObjectPrefix: ""
    website:
      mainPageSuffix: ""
      notFoundPage: ""
    acl:
    - entity: project-owners
      role: OWNER
    - entity: project-editors
      role: OWNER
    - entity: project-viewers
      role: READER
    - entity: allUsers
      role: READER
    - entity: allAuthenticatedUsers
      role: READER
    defaultObjectAcl:
    - entity: project-owners
      role: OWNER
    - entity: project-editors
      role: OWNER
    - entity: project-viewers
      role: READER
    - entity: allUsers
      role: READER
    - entity: allAuthenticatedUsers
      role: READER
    - entity: serviceAccount:${project}-backup-sa@${project}.iam.gserviceaccount.com
      role: OWNER
    - entity: serviceAccount:${project}-backup-sa@${project}.iam.gserviceaccount.com
      role: WRITER
    - entity: serviceAccount:${project}-backup-sa@${project}.iam.gserviceaccount.com
      role: READER
    - entity: serviceAccount:${project}-backup-sa@${project}.iam.gserviceaccount.com
      role: OWNER

      role: READER
